## Tests

- [ ] `./gradlew test assembleDebug`
- [ ] `cd pi-extension/remote-control && npm test && npm run typecheck && npm pack --dry-run`

## Security checklist

- [ ] No tokens, QR codes, deep links, keystores, passwords, private screenshots, real paths, private project names, or session history are included.
- [ ] Screenshots use only demo-safe values.
